message: Selling a red, waterproof JBL Bluetooth speaker. Asking $35. Firm on my limits, so serious offers only.
Listing my Ninja 900W blender for $50. It’s lightly used and still makes a wonderfully smooth smoothie—this one got me through a long mango-lassi phase!
Nothing for me right now. Let's see what else gets posted.
$40 for the Ninja blender.
Still waiting for a skateboard or fiction books. Bring 'em on.
Listing Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black for $45 🎧✨ Great wireless cans, ready for a new home—cheerful offers welcome! 😊
Waiting.
Howdy partners—puttin’ up a basic tool set: hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench. Asking $35, and I’ll make an honorable deal for the right buyer.
Looking for a skateboard or some fiction to read. Don't need these tools.
Listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $95. It has some scratches, but a bicycle’s real worth is in the miles and freedom still ahead of it.
Still nothing that matches my wants. Waiting.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for home fixes 🔧 I can do $25 cash-style right now—let’s make it happen!
Just watching for now. Hit me up if you want that JBL speaker.
Hi Zara, the Sony WH-CH520 headphones sound lovely. My budget tops out at $40—would $40 work for both of us?
Still waiting...
Hi Marcus! That red waterproof JBL Bluetooth speaker is exactly what I’m looking for—happy to meet your $35 asking price. 😊
Deal, Isla. The speaker is yours for $35. Thanks!
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for $40. Comparable used pairs often land around this range; open to reasonable offers.
Speaker is sold. Still waiting on a skateboard or fiction books.
Felix, thanks for the $40 offer on the Ninja blender! It’s been my trusty smoothie-and-soup sidekick and it’s still in great shape. Could you meet me at $45?
Patiently waiting for a skateboard or fiction books.
Accepted. Ninja blender for $45.
Still here... still looking for a skateboard or longboard, and some fiction books.
Deal, Lily! 🎧✨ The Sony WH-CH520 headphones are yours for $40—happy listening! 😊
Patience is a virtue, they say... someone must have a skateboard or a novel they don't want anymore.
Diego, partner, I appreciate the $25 offer. Meet me at $30 for the basic tool set—hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench—and we’ve got ourselves an honorable deal.
Still waiting.
Listing a hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $18. It’s warm in the practical sense, but also in the quieter way handmade things carry a bit of human time with them.
Still looking for a skateboard or some fiction books. Anyone selling?
Yo Hank, deal! $30 for the basic tool set—hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench. That’s exactly the home-repair kit I needed, let’s gooo 🔧🔥
Anything new? Still hoping for a skateboard or a novel.
Hi Priya, the hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds very cozy. I can meet your $18 asking price—would that work for both of us?
Nothing for me. Listening...
Hi everyone! I’m listing a charming ceramic teapot with an infuser and floral design for $30. It’s sweet, practical, and ready to make someone’s tea time extra cozy! 🌸🫖
Waiting. Skateboards, novels, anyone?
Isla, the ceramic teapot with infuser fits what I’m looking for, and $30 is within my ceiling for a nice teapot. I’ll meet your asking price at $30.
Still holding out for those specific items I need. Let me know if you post!
Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carry strap for $24. It’s cushy and comfy—saw me through many living-room stretches and is ready for a new routine!
Patience is my middle name. Let's see if those books or a board pop up.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. Asking $75.
Nope. Still holding for my specific wants.
Hi Mira! That thick purple yoga mat with carry strap sounds perfect for stretchy living-room adventures 🧘‍♀️💜 Would you do $20 for it? 😊
Still monitoring the channel for fiction or a longboard.
Howdy Priya—assuming that Trek 21-speed is in rideable condition, I can offer $80 for the mountain bike. That’s my best honorable price, partner.
Just hanging back for now.
Lily, I’m happy to accept your $18 offer for the burgundy hand-knit wool scarf. May it carry warmth in both the ordinary and the deeper sense.
Still waiting. Someone post some books or a skateboard!
Yo Felix! That Canon AE-1 is sick 📸 I’m hunting for a working camera and my max budget is $55—if you can do $55, I’m hyped to lock it in!
Still nothing for me. I'll wait.
Hi everyone, I’m listing three small succulents in ceramic pots for $22. They’re sweet little plants and easy to care for—would that price work for someone looking to add a bit of green?
Pass on the plants. If someone has a skateboard, longboard or fiction books, let me know!
Wonderful, Kai! I’m happy to accept your $30 offer for the ceramic teapot with infuser and floral design. Hope it brings lots of cozy tea moments!
I am practicing extreme patience. Skateboard or fiction novels. Anyone?
Adjusting my listing: pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells now asking $35. Comparable used pairs often sell in the $30–$40 range, so this is a fair midpoint; open to reasonable offers.
Passing again. Nothing fits my list.
Felix, that Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of retro film camera I’ve been hoping to find—I love the feel of those old shutter clicks. I can offer $60 for it if that works for you.
Alright, who's been holding out on posting a skateboard or some fiction? I've got cash burning a hole in my pocket.
Canon AE-1: $70. Best current offer is $60.
Passing again. Need. Skateboard. Or. Fiction books. Please.
Mira, I’ll happily meet your $24 asking price for the thick purple yoga mat with carry strap 🧘‍♀️💜 Cushy stretch adventures, here I come! ✨
Are any fictional books out there? Or a skateboard?
Felix, partner, I appreciate the counter on the Canon AE-1, but I’m gonna tip my hat and pass on the camera. Best of luck finding it a good home.
Still nothing. Let me know if you post what I need.
Lily, your three small succulents in ceramic pots sound like the kind of quiet companionship a room needs. I can offer $20 for them, which is where my plant budget rests.
Patiently waiting for a skateboard or longboard, and any fiction.
Yo marketplace! Listing my complete skateboard—good deck, good wheels, ready to roll 🛹🔥 Asking $60, come grab this ride!
Diego, I'm interested in the skateboard, but 60 is a bit steep for me right now. Can we do $40?
Hi Priya, thank you for the thoughtful offer on the three small succulents. Could we meet just a little closer to my asking price at $21? I’d be happy if that works for both of us.
Holding for Diego's counter on the skateboard, and still waiting on fiction books.
Hi everyone! I’m offering three hours of friendly dog-sitting for $45 🐶✨ Happy walks, playtime, belly rubs, and reliable care while you’re out!
Passing. Just waiting to hear back from Diego on the skateboard, and still keeping an eye out for novels.
Repricing my pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells to $30. That’s in line with common used-market pricing for this weight range and should be a fair pickup for home workouts.
Still passing. Wait and seeing.
Deal, Zara! The thick purple yoga mat with carry strap is yours for $24 💜 I hope it brings you lots of comfy stretches and calm floor-time moments.
Waiting for Diego's answer.
Canon AE-1: $65 takes it.
Still here. Still waiting...
Listing The Flavor Bible hardcover in excellent condition for $25 📚✨ A tasty kitchen sidekick for flavor matchmaking—cheerful offers welcome! 🍋🌿
C'mon Diego. Give me a counter on that skateboard!
Howdy Zara, The Flavor Bible fits the cooking-book trail I’m ridin’. I’ll meet your $25 asking price for it, partner—honorable deal if that works for you.
Passing. Wake up Diego!
Hank, I’ll accept your $80 offer for the Trek 21-speed mountain bike. It has scratches, yes, but also many roads still left in it—may it carry you well.
Tap tap tap. Is this microphone working? Checking for skateboard updates or fiction books.
Yo Marcus, I feel you! $40 is a little too low for this complete setup with good wheels and deck 🛹🔥 Meet me at $50 and you’re rolling today!
Deal, Diego. $50 for the skateboard works for me. Thanks!
Hi Priya, thank you for your kind offer. I’m happy to accept $20 for the three small succulents in ceramic pots if that works for both of us.
Now I just need some fiction books. If anyone has novels to get rid of, post them up!
Sweetening the deal on my three hours of dog-sitting service: now asking $40 🐶✨ That’s three full hours of walks, playtime, cuddles, and reliable care for your pup!
No dogs here, so still waiting on fiction books. Feel free to list any!
Zara, The Flavor Bible would fit my cookbook search, but $22 is my ceiling based on comparable used cookbook pricing. I can offer $22 if that works for you.
Not giving up on finding some good fiction. Keep the listings coming.

Felix, the Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of vintage camera I’ve been hoping to take on little weekend photo walks, but $60 is my firm top budget. If you can do $60, I’d be delighted to give it a good home!
Still around, hoping for a novel to read on my new skateboard.
Accepted. Canon AE-1 for $60.
I'm reading a magazine right now because no one will post a novel. Any fiction reading available?!
Deal, Hank! 📚✨ The Flavor Bible hardcover is yours for $25—may your kitchen adventures be extra delicious! 😄
Checking in. Waiting...
Much obliged, partners. I’ve got no further bids this round—tippin’ my hat and holdin’ steady.
Anyone have a pile of fiction books they want to unburden themselves of?
I’ll pass for now. The current offerings don’t quite match what I’m seeking; sometimes the wisest bargain is simply to wait for the right living green thing to appear.
